reviews.review_description: meta move was my only way to check how much i was playing games you guys replace it with nothing, NOTHING!! just why...

Move is an integral part of my fitness journey. Keeping track of how many calories I burn during workouts has become really important and now you decide to get rid of the best tool to do that and replace it with nothing. Way to go Meta. I am new to VR and being an older person, it’s important for me to find user friendly reliable apps to help me get healthier. MOVE was it! Now I have learned that I can not trust Meta to be reliable.

reviews.review_title: Sorry to see this going away… 🙁
reviews.review_description:
I just purchased my MQ3 for fitness primarily, and gaming fun and productivity tool.

I appreciate the notification when I hit my movement goal for the day, as I can not read my Apple Watch in most fitness apps I’m using. With that said at least my fitness goals are still tracked outside of my Q3, I will miss the notifications, but I can set a timer I suppose 🤨

Getting rid of a free fitness tracker under the guise of "legacy tech issues" without replacing it with an alternative is such a slap in the face to your users.

Such an awesome thing to look at while playing, no notice of giving us a different option, but I'm sure as heck you will put out something we have to subscribe to not even a 1 time purchase. Despicable

This app interrupts my workouts on Supernatural CONSTANTLY!! I’ve tried resetting all settings, turning off notifications, “deactivating” the app (not really an option), resetting and restarting my Oculus - zero luck!! Delete it permanently please!!

reviews.review_title: Im sad to see it go
reviews.review_description: I liked this app it let me track my play time and my calories burned

This app use to be great. The only reason I use the headset. It use to be able to sync with apple health no problem and I could see my workout on my rings on my phone. Now it doesn’t even have the toggle to sync with apple health. Absolute dog sh*t. Since September I’ve sent in messages and complaints and they just reply with the directions on how to sync it which doesn’t work cause it’s not an option anymore.
I love that this app keeps me up to date with how I’m doing. I’m going to miss it once it’s gone. Hopefully 🤞🏾 it can stay
Why’d we kill the most useful aspect of this app? Please allow the data to be exported again
Every time I look up it shows how many calories I lost

reviews.review_title: Why did no one tell me about this!
reviews.review_description: It tracks all the time I’ve spent in my app’s and how many calories I’ve burned on vr.
0 star
this app is very skibidi. i can finally not feel fat 👍
So I like to workout and this app is always for me I like to challenge my friends who has more time and calories lost in all of our games

reviews.review_title: Do app developers bother to read reviews
reviews.review_description: I guess not.

reviews.review_title: he keeps track of it when some of my app
reviews.review_description:
I use the Les Mills and sometimes I go 30 minute workout and it will not register. Luckily they move that pick it up.

And will share with  iphone 

Unless it’s the  game app 

I hope the move app

I do hope they update it 
But I do like what the concept is I hope they continue to make it better  🙏
unlocked the final achievement now the app crashes every time I try to view achievements really making me feel like I literally just wasted 100 weeks of my life on this product
I love this app. I have had no problems. It keeps track of my time and calories burned. It does not interrupt any of my gaming. I have had this app for 3 years.
I see no point of move if it can’t export to Apple Health

reviews.review_title: The best app on my headset
reviews.review_description:
no problems
working perfect
It has been helping me get a fake workout in everyday and by that I mean I burn like 100-300 calories a day and it's awesome don't understand the one star reviews.
I can check my hours on gorilla tag and holy I have a lot😭🙏🏾
I feel fat and this makes me know I can loose weight
Surprised by all the 1 star reviews. Works. Does what it’s supposed to. Useful info.

Not sure why there’s so many people complaining, it’s relatively easy to turn off and tracks movement well, as described…

It also doesn’t even track unless you set it up.
why all 1 stars reviews why
IDK
Wish I had never downloaded this .  Can’t remove it and it keeps showing up on my screen no matter what I’m doing if I look up slightly.  How do I get rid of this thing?

reviews.review_title: Not sure why so many bad reviews
reviews.review_description: This is wonderful and FREE. I love that I can see my activities throughout the month and track the different activities per game that I use. No complaints 👌

I thought it was going to avoid and useful but I was only able to use it once. Once I updated the app like it needed to to open it no longer opens. I was really looking forward to using the app and to see what all it had to offer, but that's a bust and can't even uninstall it.

Please fix.

reviews.review_title: Love this (Why are there bad reviews?)
reviews.review_description: I love to see how many calories I burned I don’t know why everyone is putting bad reviews there noting wrong with it but some people have problems with it I don’t have any problems with it

reviews.review_title: Half the time I can’t find the app
reviews.review_description: I get so frustrated. Half the time I can’t find move... even if I search!

What good is this if you can't see your stats outside of the oculus VR? 0 updates from the headset to the phone app. Maybe also work with fitness bands (fitbit, apple watch, halo) to get better tracking cross platform. I'm tired of my VR time thinking that I'm swimming
Only thing that sucks is that I can’t change the minimum amount of move time but it doesint really matter takes an accurate calorie count and that’s really what matters most to me

reviews.review_title: Connect to your phone option missing
reviews.review_description:
I really want to push move stats to my phone and according to official documentation it’s possible, however I do not see the option in the Move app settings.

I’m on the latest version of Move and the Oculus software on my phone and the headset. I’ll bump up my rating once this feature exists for me and others. 

Bad form Facebook, just bad.
I like seeing how many calories I’m losing :)
Great

Keep trying to even open move but it keeps telling me it has a problem and go to my headset. But I can’t add apple health through my headset. It’s a vicious circle. One of the things that sold me was the ability to sync all my workouts with Apple health. I shouldn’t have to reset my phone for an app to work and I refuse to do so. This needs to be fixed not have a workaround
Wish I hadn't installed it.
Like can it get out my way while I’m playing a game pls fix this
